We need to determine the falling distance using d = k*t^2. Let me find k from the examples.
I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

t = 2.81s, d = 23.22m:
t^2 = 2.81 * 2.81:
2.81 * 0.01 = 0.0281
2.81 * 0.80 = 2.2480
2.81 * 2.00 = 5.6200
0.0281 + 2.2480 = 2.2761
2.2761 + 5.6200 = 7.8961
k = 23.22 / 2.81^2 = 23.22 / 7.8961 = 23.220 / 7.896
= 0 + 1 * 23220 / 7896
= 1 + 1 * 15324 / 7896
= 2 + 1 * 7428 / 7896
= 2.0 + 0.1 * 74280 / 7896
= 2.1 + 0.1 * 66384 / 7896
= 2.2 + 0.1 * 58488 / 7896
= 2.3 + 0.1 * 50592 / 7896
= 2.4 + 0.1 * 42696 / 7896
= 2.5 + 0.1 * 34800 / 7896
= 2.6 + 0.1 * 26904 / 7896
= 2.7 + 0.1 * 19008 / 7896
= 2.8 + 0.1 * 11112 / 7896
= 2.9 + 0.1 * 3216 / 7896
= 2.90 + 0.01 * 32160 / 7896
= 2.91 + 0.01 * 24264 / 7896
= 2.92 + 0.01 * 16368 / 7896
= 2.93 + 0.01 * 8472 / 7896
= 2.94 + 0.01 * 576 / 7896
= 2.940 + 0.001 * 5760 / 7896
= 2.940

t = 2.09s, d = 12.84m:
t^2 = 2.09 * 2.09:
2.09 * 0.09 = 0.1881
2.09 * 2.00 = 4.1800
0.1881 + 4.1800 = 4.3681
k = 12.84 / 2.09^2 = 12.84 / 4.3681 = 12.840 / 4.368
= 0 + 1 * 12840 / 4368
= 1 + 1 * 8472 / 4368
= 2 + 1 * 4104 / 4368
= 2.0 + 0.1 * 41040 / 4368
= 2.1 + 0.1 * 36672 / 4368
= 2.2 + 0.1 * 32304 / 4368
= 2.3 + 0.1 * 27936 / 4368
= 2.4 + 0.1 * 23568 / 4368
= 2.5 + 0.1 * 19200 / 4368
= 2.6 + 0.1 * 14832 / 4368
= 2.7 + 0.1 * 10464 / 4368
= 2.8 + 0.1 * 6096 / 4368
= 2.9 + 0.1 * 1728 / 4368
= 2.90 + 0.01 * 17280 / 4368
= 2.91 + 0.01 * 12912 / 4368
= 2.92 + 0.01 * 8544 / 4368
= 2.93 + 0.01 * 4176 / 4368
= 2.930 + 0.001 * 41760 / 4368
= 2.931 + 0.001 * 37392 / 4368
= 2.932 + 0.001 * 33024 / 4368
= 2.933 + 0.001 * 28656 / 4368
= 2.934 + 0.001 * 24288 / 4368
= 2.935 + 0.001 * 19920 / 4368
= 2.936 + 0.001 * 15552 / 4368
= 2.937 + 0.001 * 11184 / 4368
= 2.938 + 0.001 * 6816 / 4368
= 2.939 + 0.001 * 2448 / 4368
= 2.939

t = 2.78s, d = 22.72m:
t^2 = 2.78 * 2.78:
2.78 * 0.08 = 0.2224
2.78 * 0.70 = 1.9460
2.78 * 2.00 = 5.5600
0.2224 + 1.9460 = 2.1684
2.1684 + 5.5600 = 7.7284
k = 22.72 / 2.78^2 = 22.72 / 7.7284 = 22.720 / 7.728
= 0 + 1 * 22720 / 7728
= 1 + 1 * 14992 / 7728
= 2 + 1 * 7264 / 7728
= 2.0 + 0.1 * 72640 / 7728
= 2.1 + 0.1 * 64912 / 7728
= 2.2 + 0.1 * 57184 / 7728
= 2.3 + 0.1 * 49456 / 7728
= 2.4 + 0.1 * 41728 / 7728
= 2.5 + 0.1 * 34000 / 7728
= 2.6 + 0.1 * 26272 / 7728
= 2.7 + 0.1 * 18544 / 7728
= 2.8 + 0.1 * 10816 / 7728
= 2.9 + 0.1 * 3088 / 7728
= 2.90 + 0.01 * 30880 / 7728
= 2.91 + 0.01 * 23152 / 7728
= 2.92 + 0.01 * 15424 / 7728
= 2.93 + 0.01 * 7696 / 7728
= 2.930 + 0.001 * 76960 / 7728
= 2.931 + 0.001 * 69232 / 7728
= 2.932 + 0.001 * 61504 / 7728
= 2.933 + 0.001 * 53776 / 7728
= 2.934 + 0.001 * 46048 / 7728
= 2.935 + 0.001 * 38320 / 7728
= 2.936 + 0.001 * 30592 / 7728
= 2.937 + 0.001 * 22864 / 7728
= 2.938 + 0.001 * 15136 / 7728
= 2.939 + 0.001 * 7408 / 7728
= 2.939

k values: 2.940, 2.939, 2.939
k values (sorted): 2.939, 2.939, 2.940
The median k is 2.939.

For t = 2.84:
t^2 = 2.84 * 2.84:
2.84 * 0.04 = 0.1136
2.84 * 0.80 = 2.2720
2.84 * 2.00 = 5.6800
0.1136 + 2.2720 = 2.3856
2.3856 + 5.6800 = 8.0656
= 8.0656

d = 2.939 * 8.0656:
2.939 * 0.0006 = 0.0017634
2.939 * 0.0050 = 0.0146950
2.939 * 0.0600 = 0.1763400
2.939 * 8.0000 = 23.5120000
0.0017634 + 0.0146950 = 0.0164584
0.0164584 + 0.1763400 = 0.1927984
0.1927984 + 23.5120000 = 23.7047984
= 23.704

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{23.704}
